stemHtml: Flying where no ATC or advisory service exists, what must you do if you suffer a receiver failure?

options.a: Precede all transmissions with "Transmitting blind due to receiver failure", report at scheduled times, and transmit intended actions.
options.b: Say it twice on the first call, then transmit normally.
options.c: Say it twice on the first transmission, then report at scheduled times.
options.d: Say "Transmitting blind due to receiver failure" twice on the first call, then make no further transmissions.
